transactions.desc: Tellez has chosen to become a free agent after Atlanta outrighted him to Triple-A Gwinnett on Saturday, Barrett Sallee of 680 The Fan Atlanta reports.
Milwaukee recalled Yoho from Triple-A Nashville on Saturday.
The Dodgers optioned Robinson to Triple-A Oklahoma City on Saturday.
The Dodgers selected Alfonzo's contract from Triple-A Oklahoma City on Saturday.
The Cubs designated Wilson for assignment Saturday.
The Cubs signed Woodford to a major-league contract Saturday.
The Rockies selected Romano's contract from Triple-A Albuquerque on Saturday.
The Rockies recalled Sullivan from Triple-A Albuquerque on Saturday.
The Yankees optioned Beck to Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre on Saturday.
The Athletics optioned Meneses to Triple-A Las Vegas on Saturday.
The Athletics optioned Hernaiz to Triple-A Las Vegas on Saturday.
The Athletics selected Serven's contract from Triple-A Las Vegas on Saturday.
The Athletics reinstated Gelof (hand) from the 10-day injured list Saturday.
San Francisco recalled Bivens from Triple-A Sacramento on Saturday, Justice delos Santos of The San Jose Mercury News reports.
The Royals recalled Cuas from Triple-A Omaha on Saturday.
The Nationals optioned Kent to Triple-A Rochester on Saturday.
Washington claimed Krook off outright waivers from the Athletics on Saturday.
Hartlieb cleared waivers Saturday and was outrighted to Triple-A Las Vegas by the Athletics.
The Pirates released Marte from his minor-league contract Saturday, Danny Demilio of PittsburghBaseballNow.com reports.
Miller (hips) was reinstated from Triple-A Toledo's 7-day injured list Saturday, Emily Waldon of Baseball America reports.
Houston optioned Loperfido to Triple-A Sugar Land on Saturday.
The Astros optioned Meyers to Triple-A Sugar Land on Saturday.
The Astros reinstated Wade (hamstring) from the 10-day injured list Saturday.
The Phillies recalled Banks from Triple-A Lehigh Valley on Saturday.
The Philadelphia Phillies traded RHP Ryan Degges to the Cleveland Guardians.
Atlanta optioned Molina to Triple-A Gwinnett on Saturday.
Atlanta reinstated Farmer (forearm) from the 10-day injured list Saturday.
Atlanta recalled Ritchie from Triple-A Gwinnett on Saturday.
Keegan cleared outright waivers and was assigned by the Orioles to Double-A Chesapeake on Saturday, Roch Kubatko of MASNSports.com reports.
The Rangers reinstated Martin (shoulder) from the 15-day injured list Saturday.
